characters.name: Talon Academy students
characters.description: TheTalon Academy studentsare former students ofTalon Academy. They formerly work forSnipeunder theCyclonian territoryatTalon Academywhen they allyAerrowandPiperto defeat theCyclonian Talonswith the help ofStork,FinnandJunko.

characters.name: Aerrow
characters.description: AerrowBackground InformationFirst episode"Age of Heroes (Part 1)"Voiced bySamuel VincentCharacter InformationSpeciesHumanSquadronStorm HawksPositionSky KnightRideAir Skimmer III UltraWeaponTwin Energy BladesTerraCondorTerra Neverlandis(formerly)Relative(s)Lightning Strike(Father), Unknown motherStatusAlive Aerrowis the main protagonist inStorm Hawks. As a qualifiedSky Knight, Aerrow is the current leader of the reformedStorm Hawks, and is sworn to defendAtmosfrom the evil forces ofCyclonia. Aerrow was born in Atmos as the last descendant of the legendaryLightning Strike. The fate or whereabouts of his parents are unknown, although it is speculated that they perished ten years ago during the Sky Knights war againstMaster Cyclonis, which resulted in the annihilation of the Storm Hawks after the betrayal ofDark Ace.[1]

characters.name: Arygyn
characters.description: ArygynBackground InformationFirst episode"The Lesson"Character InformationPositionWarrior Trainer and Guardian of the AtmosWeaponMagical Scepter Arygynis a famous warrior trainer and shape shifter. He first appears in the episode "The Lesson", to inform the Storm Hawks of a plan to wipe out all the Sky Knights. He returns briefly in the episode "Payback" to inform Aerrow of his destiny before leaving with the other Guardians. Arygyn has super human speed, telekinesis, and the ability to manipulate matter. He and the other Guardians also possess the ability to shape shift into a bird, and the ability to see the future. In the episode "The Lesson", Arygyn used his precognitive abilities to train the Storm Hawks to fight the specific conditions that they will be attacked by. It is unclear which of these abilities are natural and which are a result of his crystal scepter.

characters.name: Billy Rex
characters.description: Billy RexBackground InformationFirst episode"Velocity"Voiced byAsaph FipkeCharacter InformationSpeciesBlizzarianSquadronAbsolute ZeroesPositionBackcountry riderRideIce GrinderTerraTerra BlizzarisStatusAlive Billy Rexis aBlizzarianand a member of theAbsolute Zeroes. He loves nothing more than pushing hisIce Grinderto the limits while stunting in the back country of his homeTerra Blizzaris. Billy Rex, just as the rest of Absolute Zeroes, likes to perform extreme stunts, although they frequently (if not always) ending up crashing. In "Fire and Ice", Billy Rex was mistaken to be the Sky Knight and leader of Absolute Zeroes byAerrow. He speaks with a stereotypical Canadian accent, frequently adding words likehoser, chief, andehin his speech. He is voiced by the show's creator Asaph Fipke. Like all Blizzarians, he is covered in light blue fur with white patches on his body and face. He has dark blue hair and yellow eyes.

characters.name: Bludlust
characters.description: Bludlustis a short member of theMurk Raiders. He wears a red bandana.

He enjoys racing withBilly RexandDavey Digger.

characters.name: Captain Scabulous
characters.description: Captain ScabulousBackground InformationFirst episode"Terra Deep (episode)"Voiced byMark OliverCharacter InformationSquadronMurk RaidersPositionSky KnightRideBlood CrowWeaponEnergy Sabre, Metal Claw, Energy BlasterTerraTerra DeepStatusAlive Captain Scabulousis the leader of the feared band of marauders known as theMurk Raiders. His terrifying escapades at the helm of theBlood Croware legendary, and the mere mention of Captain Scabulous’ name will send chills down almost any spine in theAtmos. Scabulous speaks with a thick Scottish accent, and bears a large burn on the side of his face, which he received when attempting to fight a mechanicalDragon. He also uses an prosthetic arm, equipped with a large metal claw.

characters.name: Captain Scabulous
characters.description: Captain ScabulousBackground InformationFirst episode"Terra Deep (episode)"Voiced byMark OliverCharacter InformationSquadronMurk RaidersPositionSky KnightRideBlood CrowWeaponEnergy Sabre, Metal Claw, Energy BlasterTerraTerra DeepStatusAlive Captain Scabulousis the leader of the feared band of marauders known as theMurk Raiders. characters.name: Carver
characters.description: CarverBackground InformationFirst episode"Age of Heroes (Part 1)"Voiced byBrian DrummondCharacter InformationSpeciesHumanSquadronRed Eagles(formerly)PositionSky Knight (formerly)RideAir Skimmer III UltraWeaponEnergy Blade, Energy StaffTerraTerra AtmosiaStatusAlive (Imprisoned) Carverwas originally the leader of theRed Eagles, considered to be the greatestSky Knightsquadron after the destruction of theOriginal Storm Hawks10 years prior. As such, he was seen as being both the greatest living Sky Knight and a true hero, until his imprisonment by theStorm Hawksfor stealing theAurora Stonein the pilot episode. Carver was famed throughout the Atmos for his heroic deeds and adventures, such as the time he slept covered in slugs to capture a group of poachers, or went without food and water during his rescue of Princess Hannah. Carver led his team into becoming recognised as the greatest Sky Knight squadron in the entire Atmos. He even had his own fan-club, with a newsletter that kept its thousands of members up to date on his deeds. Carver's squadron wore only the finest armour and clothing, living a life of celebrity as the heroes of Atmosia.

characters.name: Chief Thragg
characters.description: Chief ThraggBackground InformationFirst episodeA Wallop For All SeasonsVoiced byScott McNeilCharacter InformationAliasesCyclonians (formerly)SpeciesWallopPositionChief of the Terra WallopTerraTerra WallopStatusAlive but Arrested Chief Thraggis a Wallop who is the leader and chief of the Wallop who first appears in "A Wallop For All Seasons" as the main antagonist. He's an aggressive and stubborn Wallop who believes strong that makes a Wallop not a weakling and he invited the Cyclonians for a peace treaty and he wants to be on a winning side but Junko tried to reason that the Cyclonians were bad guys but he refuses to listen and he challenged him for a fight. During the match, Junko tries to reason with the chief, but the chief won't listen. Junko realizes the chief won't fight the Cyclonians because he is afraid to stand up to them, and manages to subdue the chief by tricking him into knocking trees onto himself. Junko refuses to deliver the finishing below that would solidify his position as the new chief and he told Junko that he's not a Wallop but a disgrace. The other Wallops however don't support Cyclonia. InCyclonia Rising (Part 2)he was betrayed and got arrested.

characters.name: Clowniac
characters.description: ClowniacBackground InformationFirst episode"The Masked Masher"Voiced byDavid SparrowCharacter InformationSpeciesHumanPositionWrestlerWeaponExploding pies, jack-n-box, clown carStatusAlive Clowniacis a wrestler who participated in the Mega Warrior Championship in "The Masked Masher". He successfully defeated one other wrestler, before being taken down byJunko(disguising as the Masked Masher) with his own weapons. The nameClowniacis a portmanteau ofclownandmaniac.

characters.name: Clowniac
characters.description: ClowniacBackground InformationFirst episode"The Masked Masher"Voiced byDavid SparrowCharacter InformationSpeciesHumanPositionWrestlerWeaponExploding pies, jack-n-box, clown carStatusAlive Clowniacis a wrestler who participated in the Mega Warrior Championship in "The Masked Masher". characters.name: Colonel
characters.description: ColonelBackground InformationFirst episode"Thunder Run"Voiced byMark OliverCharacter InformationSpeciesUnknownWeaponSeeker Missiles and Web ShootersTerraColonel's CompoundStatusAlive The Colonelis a large, four-legged, spider-like gangster, infamous throughout theAtmos. He lives in abig mansionlocated on an isolated terra where he maintains a large collection of both valuable objects and exotic food. He is served by four bulky-looking human bodyguards. From his first episode in "Thunder Run", the Colonel appears very suave, yet is so intimidating that theStorm Hawksand theRaptorsalike are afraid of him. To keep himself strong, the Colonel eats dishes that would usually kill most people, although he is matched, and eventually bested, byJunkoin an eating contest. A favorite of his for dessert is frozen yogurt found in an icebar on the other side of the Atmos. Due to his Spanish accent, he pronounces it as "rozen yoga". The Colonel makes his second appearance in "Dude, Where's My Condor?" when he buys and remodels theCondor. The Storm Hawks then challenge the Colonel to a race, in the hopes that they will win back the Condor. The Colonel beats them easily, and claims the Storm Hawks' replacement ship as his prize. The Storm Hawks resort to hiding aboard the Condor but get caught, narrowly avoiding punishment by claiming they want to see his "historic" flight to break the air speed barrier. However, at such high speeds, the Condor begins to fall apart, forcing the Colonel to give it back to the Storm Hawks. In this episode,Storkis the only one brave enough to stand up to the Colonel, if only because the Condor is in danger.

characters.name: Commander Scarface
characters.description: Commander ScarfaceBackground InformationFirst episode"Radarr Love"Character InformationSpeciesHumanSquadronCyclonian TalonsPositionLieutenant, Ship CommanderRideCyclonian DestroyerWeaponCyclonian's StaffTerraTerra CycloniaStatusAlive Commander Scarface(credited asCommander Number 2orCommander #2) is the self-proclaimed name of a Cyclonian Destroyer commander. The name is derived from the distinctive scar on his right cheek. Despite considered to be one of the top ship commanders inMaster Cyclonis' fleet, he is relatively unknown, nor as high ranking as the likes ofSnipeandRavess. He constantly seeks to make a name for himself, both figuratively and literally.

characters.name: Dark Ace
characters.description: Dark AceBackground InformationFirst episode"Age of Heroes (Part 1)"Voiced bySamuel VincentCharacter InformationSpeciesHumanSquadronCyclonian TalonsStorm Hawks(formerly)PositionCyclonian CommanderRideTalon Switchblade EliteWeaponTwo-Handed Crystal BladeTerraTerra CycloniaStatusDeceased The Dark Aceis a veteran pilot in the service of theCyclonian Empire. He is the central antagonist ofStorm Hawks (TV series). He is currently allied to theCyclonians, although he was formerly a member of theOriginal Storm Hawksbefore he betrayed them. He is a feared pilot inAtmosand is said to be undefeated. However, after the first fight between himself andAerrow, the Dark Ace is continually 'defeated' by theStorm Hawks, although the fights are often interrupted or the circumstances change in the favor of the younger pilots. Nevertheless, he is still a force to be reckoned with in the battle for control of Atmos.

characters.name: Dove
characters.description: DoveBackground InformationFirst episode"Gale Force Winds"Voiced byTabitha St. GermainCharacter InformationSpeciesHumanSquadronRebel Ducks(Informally)PositionCommander, Political LeaderRideAir Skimmer III UltraWeaponEnergy StaffTerraTerra GaleStatusAliveDoveis the granddaughter ofWren, an eccentric old man who appears to lead the Terra Gale squadron, theRebel Ducks(at least as a figurehead). Terra Galewas conquered long ago by Cyclonia, and its people enslaved. Not having access to proper armor, she instead fortifies herself with household objects like cooking pots. Dove speaks with a distinct French Canadian accent, as do the rest of the inhabitants of Terra Gale. In "Gale Force Winds", she is kidnapped by the Dark Ace while defending Terra Gale. She is later rescued from Cyclonian prison by the Storm Hawks. This may be why she is the only one who believed that the Storm Hawks were innocent in "Atmos Most Wanted".

characters.name: Eyeball
characters.description: EyeballBackground InformationVoiced byScott McNeilCharacter InformationSquadronMurk RaidersPositionRight-hand manRideBlood CrowWeaponEnergy cutlassTerraTerra Deep EyeballisCaptain Scabulous' right-hand man. He is a large, overweight humanoid with one eye (hence his nickname) and wears an eyepatch to cover this. He works for theMurk Raiders, acting as Captain Scabulous' First Mate. Despite being his right-hand man, Eyeball is not very bright, but does appear to be very loyal to his captain and Crew. If Eyeball has a good idea or makes a sensible suggestion Scabulous will agree with him.

characters.name: Eyeball
characters.description: EyeballBackground InformationVoiced byScott McNeilCharacter InformationSquadronMurk RaidersPositionRight-hand manRideBlood CrowWeaponEnergy cutlassTerraTerra Deep EyeballisCaptain Scabulous' right-hand man. characters.name: Finn
characters.description: FinnBackground InformationFirst episode"Age of Heroes (Part 1)"Voiced byMatt HillCharacter InformationSpeciesHumanSquadronStorm HawksPositionWingman & SharpshooterRideAir Skimmer IIIWeaponEnergy CrossbowTerraCondorTerra Neverlandis(formerly)StatusAlive Finnis a main character inStorm Hawks. He is the wingman and primary sharpshooter of theStorm Hawkssquadron. Finn is the 14-year-old wing-man and sharpshooter of the Storm Hawks. He is an egotistical and hyperactive flyer who nevertheless is invaluable when it comes to anything that requires precision aiming. Despite Finn's faults, he often proves himself a capable warrior when the situation calls for it. In other respects, however, Finn is far less than competent, namely where piloting, women, and hand-to-hand combat are concerned. In "Origins," Finn,Aerrow,RadarrandPiperare revealed to be orphans, and lived inTerra Neverlandis, which they had protected and built a shelter on.

characters.name: Finn Clones
characters.description: Finn ClonesBackground InformationFirst episode"Infinnity"Character InformationSpeciesHuman (clone)Relative(s)Finn(Template)StatusDisappeared Finn cloneswere cloned versions ofFinncreated by theCloning Crystal. Their only appearance was in  "Infinnity". Each clone acts as their own entity and shares the same personality with the origin. However, when one clone is attacked, all other clones will react in the same manner (e.g. feel pain when a clone is punched on the arm, or drop on the floor when one clone trips over).

characters.name: Flop Top
characters.description: Flop TopBackground InformationFirst episode"Talon Academy (episode)"Voiced bySamuel VincentCharacter InformationSpeciesHumanPositionTalonStatusUnknown Flop Topis a cadet in theTalon Academy. He befriendsTop Dogand bullies other fellow students alongside him. However after learning ofSnipe's plan to invadeTerra Tranqua, Flop Top turns against his friend and Snipe.

characters.description: GriffinBackground InformationFirst episode"Scouts' Honour"Voiced byMatt HillCharacter InformationSpeciesMerbTerraTerra Merbia Griffinis one of the three Sky Scouts (led byStork) who appeared in "Scouts' Honour". He appears to be an acrobat.

characters.name: Gundstaff
characters.description: GundstaffBackground InformationFirst episode"Life With Leugey"Voiced byColin MurdockCharacter InformationSpeciesGiantPositionCrystal researcherWeaponEnergy maceStatusAlive Gundstaffis a giant who possesses a vast amount of crystals. He lives alone on his unnamed terra, conducting various experiments on crystals in his laboratory. First seen in "Life With Leugey", Gundstaff's crystal vault is raided by theStorm Hawkswho are looking for a combination of crystals which will separateLeugeyandStork. Gundstaff is seen napping when the Storm Hawks enter, however due to Leugey's loud voice, he quickly wakes up and begins defending his laboratory.

characters.name: Hamish
characters.description: HamishBackground InformationFirst episode"Escape!"Voiced byBrian DrummondCharacter InformationSpeciesHumanPositionMr. Moss's right-hand manStatusUnknown (most likely Deceased) Hamishis a worker inTerra Zartacla's prison and serves asMr. Moss's right-hand man. He acts stupid and does often gets slapped by Mr. Moss. Later, when the Fire Scorpions are about to eat Mr. Moss, Hamish and the Cyclonians, Hamish stated that he doesn't have fire scorpion food. Hamish and Mr. Moss are presumably eaten by Fire Scorpions.

characters.name: Hamish
characters.description: HamishBackground InformationFirst episode"Escape!"Voiced byBrian DrummondCharacter InformationSpeciesHumanPositionMr. Moss's right-hand manStatusUnknown (most likely Deceased) Hamishis a worker inTerra Zartacla's prison and serves asMr. Moss's right-hand man. He acts stupid and does often gets slapped by Mr. Moss. Later, when the Fire Scorpions are about to eat Mr. Moss, Hamish and the Cyclonians, Hamish stated that he doesn't have fire scorpion food. Hamish and Mr. Moss are presumably eaten by Fire Scorpions.

characters.name: Harrier
characters.description: HarrierBackground InformationFirst episode"The Code"Voiced byScott McNeilCharacter InformationSpeciesHumanSquadronRex GuardiansPositionSky KnightRideSkimmer ClassicWeaponEnergy BladeTerraTerra RexStatusAlive Harrieris theSky Knightleader of theRex Guardians, who defendTerra Rexand is the oldest squadron in existence[2]. He is traditional and takes the Sky Knight Code seriously. He is quite stuck up and extremely old fashioned - joining with Terra Rex, which is also old fashioned, quite well - and his attitude brings along hostility with members of the Storm Hawks. His age is unknown, but it is easy to assume he is in his late twenties or thirties. He's also seen in the battle in whichLightning Strikewas defeated, and alongside Strike was one of the first Sky Knights to breach Cyclonia's defenses. He initially confiscated aPhoenix Crystalfrom the Storm Hawks, and then engaged them in a contest for it. His challenge was to compete with Aerrow in a sky joust, but when his opponent discarded his weapon, Harrier engaged the Storm hawk's leader in a brief dual. He was able to hold his own, but was eventually defeated when Aerrow dodged one of his strikes, causing him to slice into his own skimmer.
